_provenance.variantThesis: What your site should be tomorrow — same IA, same composition, every improvement applied.

scaleAudit.rationale: Captured site uses ad-hoc scale (improvements list #4). Variant A adopts samples' clamp() fluid scale verbatim — produces perfect-fourth-adjacent ratios at desktop, no collapsed-stack mid-viewport.

spacing.densityFloor: multi-audience hard floor — capped at 64px desktop / 40px floor

components.name: button-primary
components.css: .ds-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; height:40px; padding-inline:24px; border-radius:16px; font:700 14px/1.29 var(--ds-body-family); border:1.5px solid transparent; cursor:pointer; transition:background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.42,0,0,1), border-color 200ms; white-space:nowrap; } .ds-btn--sm { height:32px; padding-inline:18px; } .ds-btn--primary { background:#3b63fb; color:#fff; } .ds-btn--primary:hover { background:#274dea; }

components.name: card-nested
components.css: .ds-card-nested { background:#f8f8f8; outline:4px solid #f8f8f8; border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden; } .ds-card-nested__inner { background:#fff; border:4px solid #f8f8f8; border-radius:16px; padding:24px; }

components.name: input
components.css: .ds-input { height:40px; padding:0 12px; border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); border-radius:8px; font:400 16px/1.25 var(--ds-body-family); color:#2c2c2c; background:#fff; } .ds-input:focus { outline:0; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(59,99,251,0.2); border-color:#3b63fb; }

components.name: badge
components.css: .ds-badge { display:inline-flex; height:24px; padding:0 12px; border-radius:999px; font:700 12px/1 var(--ds-body-family); background:#f8f8f8; color:#2c2c2c; }

primary.role: Saturated CTA on light surfaces — only saturated color in the system.
rules: Reserve to white grounds. Use primary-hover (#274dea) on #f8f8f8 surfaces to maintain AA contrast.

primary-hover.role: Hover state; also doubles as the legal blue CTA on #f8f8f8 surfaces.

brand-mnemonic-red.role: RESERVED — Adobe lockup, AI add-on gradient stop, brand-mark contexts only.
rules: Never a CTA color. Never a section background. Triggers the AA contrast warning if used on white at body-sm scale.
Mixed-case display at weight 900 (Adobe Clean Display) for marquee headlines.
Period-terminated display sentences ('Transform how you share information.').
Fluid clamp() scale produces perfect-fourth-adjacent ratios at desktop.

motion.loadingPattern: lenis at end of <body>; lenis.raf in its own rAF loop; page-specific animation loops read window.__lenis.scroll (with window.scrollY fallback)
motion.reducedMotion: prefers-reduced-motion: reduce → Lenis lerp disabled (instant scroll), scroll-driven animations collapse to immediate display, garage-door fallback to static

divergence.modeReason: Captured brand signal is signal-strong (8 palette colors + Adobe Clean named in both heading and body family). User phrase pins Mode A explicitly.

craft.picked_by: user-constraint: register=brand + Mode A locks craft to captured

anchors.implies: Lenis stack + s2a token system + 16/20px radius vocabulary + clamp() fluid type scale
palette + type family + brand-mnemonic red reservation

font_deck.name: brand-inherited
font_deck.rationale: Mode A — type family pinned to captured Adobe Clean / Adobe Clean Display.

brand_faithful_inversions.inversion: literal #000 and #ffffff are legal and load-bearing
brand_faithful_inversions.reason: Captured on every of 7 extracted www.adobe.com pages. Footer black, body white. Brand-faithful retention.

brand_faithful_inversions.inversion: backdrop-filter: blur(64-128px) over rgba(255,255,255,0.64) on nav is legal
brand_faithful_inversions.reason: Captured on every page; the nav pill carries this treatment. Brand-faithful and load-bearing — removing it would visibly change the brand.
Captured surface uses hex (#3b63fb, #eb1000, #2c2c2c, etc.). Brand-faithful and load-bearing. Migrate may convert to OKLCH per-page if needed but DESIGN tokens stay hex.

guards.name: generic-2026-SaaS-silhouette
guards.rationale: Adobe.com home leads with product demo imagery, not abstract gradient + dual CTA. Captured pattern declines this silhouette already.

guards.name: pre-2024-SaaS-template
guards.rationale: No engineers-at-laptop stock + left-CTA pattern observed.

guards.name: padding-as-personality (airy on multi-audience)
guards.rationale: Multi-audience hard floor caps sectionPadding.desktop at 64px.

guards.name: stock-photography
guards.rationale: Captured imagery is product output (Generative Fill brick wall, named creators), not templated stock.

componentStyle.dualCTAPattern: primary-then-outline (on light) | solid-white-then-ghost-white (on dark) — exactly one primary per viewport

systemComponentRoles.purpose: Audience-track routing + brand mnemonic + global CTAs (View pricing, Sign In)
systemComponentRoles.position: fixed top, 8px outer padding, 64px inner pill, backdrop-blur
constraints: Adobe lockup as inline SVG (16px height) on left
Audience-track nav (4 links: Creativity & Design / PDF & E-signatures / Marketing & Commerce / Help & Support) on left after lockup, hidden below 900px
Right: icon button (all-apps waffle) + primary CTA + outline CTA
Glass pill: rgba(255,255,255,0.64) + backdrop-filter: blur(64-128px), 16px radius, 64px inner height
Inverted state legal over dark hero (logo + icon brightness:invert, outline CTA reads on dark)

systemComponentRoles.purpose: Comprehensive product/audience link grid + featured products + legal + Adobe wordmark reveal
constraints: 6-column link grid at ≥900px, 2-column at tablet, 1-column accordion on mobile
Column heading: 16px / weight 700 / white. Links: 16px / weight 400 / rgba(255,255,255,0.64).
Featured products row (Acrobat Reader / Firefly / Express / Photoshop) with 16×16 icons + 12/700 names
Bottom bar: legal (region / copyright / Do not sell / AdChoices / CCPA) + social icons (4-5)
Full-width Adobe wordmark SVG with aspect-ratio 1440/338, clip-path inset reveal on scroll (variant A keeps the wipe baseline)

systemComponentRoles.purpose: Dismissible region-detection banner (replaces the captured intercepting modal per improvements #3)
constraints: Not a modal — does not trap focus. role='region', aria-label='Region detection'
Dismiss button required; dismissal persists per-session
Background: surface or subtle accent; respects light/dark hero context

systemComponentRoles.purpose: Adobe-wide agentic search — present on home + product hubs per samples' .search-section pattern
systemComponentRoles.position: bottom-of-page section before footer (variant A) — variant B may elevate
constraints: Pill search bar at 56h, max-width 768px, rgba(255,255,255,0.10) on dark ground
Variant A keeps the agentic search on home only; variants B and C may surface it on additional pages

iaPriorities.evidence: Every captured page has primary CTA pair within first viewport (View plans and pricing, Free trial, Buy now). cta count: home=39, express=23, products=12-18 each.
iaPriorities.constraint: Variants may relocate the CTA pair within the first viewport but cannot remove it; the canonical 'Free trial' + 'Buy now' (with 'View plans and pricing' as discovery verb) pair is mandatory.

iaPriorities.evidence: Top nav with 4 audience tracks (Creativity & Design / PDF & E-signatures / Marketing & Commerce / Help & Support) on every page.
iaPriorities.constraint: Variants may reshape the deployment (mega-nav, drawer, etc.) but cannot remove the 4 tracks. Track labels stay verbatim.

iaPriorities.evidence: Product tile grid (Photoshop / Illustrator / Premiere / Express / Acrobat / Firefly) surfaced on home + express + photoshop pages.
iaPriorities.constraint: Variants must surface ≥6 product mnemonics on home. Variant C's elastic tile mosaic amplifies this; variant B treats it as a section. Variant A keeps current tile-grid composition.

iaPriorities.evidence: Brand mnemonic + product names + 'It starts with Adobe.' copy + 'Save 50% on Creative Cloud Pro' promotional surfaces.
Samples' .search-section (agentic search) pattern; captured Help & Support nav track.

dont: TRANSFORM HOW YOU SHARE INFORMATION (uppercase shout)
Atelier-grade tools for the discerning creator (editorial register on a product brand)
Click here to start (vague link verb)
Discover the magic of Adobe Photoshop AI Generative Fill technology (over-long, claim-led)

narrative.northStar: adobe.com refined for tomorrow — same multi-audience routing IA, tightened CTA vocabulary, fluid clamp() type scale, Lenis-driven entrance motion baseline, two brand-faithful inversions documented.
narrative.overview: 5-color palette (white/black/text-near-black/Adobe-blue/gray-surface) + brand-mnemonic-red reserved. Adobe Clean Display + Adobe Clean type stack at 3 weights (400/700/900) on a fluid clamp() scale. 8px base spacing, 64px section padding (multi-audience hard floor). 16px primary radius, 8px small, 32px section-transition large, 999px pill. Lenis 1.x mandatory; no GSAP.
keyCharacteristics: Routing IA preserved across all variants.
One CTA verb pair per audience track.
rules: Adobe blue is the only saturated CTA color.
Lenis stack required; no GSAP / no ScrollTrigger / no IntersectionObserver.
dos: Product mnemonic eyebrow before benefit headline.
donts: Multiple primary CTAs in one viewport.
Modal geolocation interrupt above the fold.
